workloads.lifecycle: create, connect, render, disconnect, and clean up 50 autonomous Custom Elements
workloads.property: update one public string property across 50 mounted Custom Elements
workloads.state: dispatch one internal button interaction across 50 mounted Custom Elements
workloads.list: reverse and restore 20 keyed rows inside each of 50 mounted Custom Elements

methodology.componentBoundary: autonomous Custom Elements with open Shadow DOM for Gluon, Lit, and Vue
methodology.scenarioIsolation: property renders label only; state renders button only; list renders keyed rows only; lifecycle renders all three
methodology.frameworkOrder: rotated for every warm-up and measured sample
methodology.unit: milliseconds per 50 components; lower is faster
